summary: W1534 packages the W1533 W829 direct-source stable fields as explicit stable-certificate evidence. It assembles ordinary stable semantic inputs, W528-style stable four-projection certificates, readiness proofs, accepted stable-route evidence, and accepted guarded stable bounded-derived packages for both closed-map and closed-embedding branches, preserves the 74-input W987 ledger, and leaves the final original four-task completion surface nonterminal with productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

W1534 packages W1533 stable fields as W528-style certificate readiness, accepted stable-route evidence, and accepted guarded stable packages, but it still preserves the W987 74-input ledger rather than constructing all 74 inputs from independent mathematical data.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; the current route still relies on assumed boundary, relation, target-surjectivity, target-compactness, mapped-cokernel, selected-difference, strict-preimage, normalized-lift, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation, endpoint, localized-unit, unit mapping-cone, selected-cochain, strict-realization, iso-closure, target-isomorphism, target-ExactAt, target-homology-zero, concrete-leaves target-ExactAt, endpoint-localized target-ExactAt, closedness-branch target-ExactAt, target-ExactAt left-calculus, comparison-bijectivity left-calculus, direct-left-calculus, W829 stable-field, W829 stable-certificate, and other W987 constructor fields rather than a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1534/W1533/W1532/W1531/W1530/W1529/W1528/W1527/W1526/W1525/W1524/W1523/W1522/W1521/W1520/W1519/W1518/W1517/W1516/W1515/W1514/W1513/W1512/W1511/W1510/W1509/W1508/W1507/W1506/W1505/W1504/W1503/W1502/W1501/W1500/W1499/W1498/W1497/W1496/W1495 route inputs and remaining W1494 constructor inputs, or replace the field-ledger route with an explicit positive witness satisfying the positive-witness supplement.
Before any product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
